instructions: You are an expert game developer. Create a single-page HTML/JS game. Arrow keys to move if applicable. Space to shoot. MUST feature clickable Restart/Go again button upon Game Over. FOR MOBILE: Generate a virtual gamepad. 8. Split mobile screen: 2 rows, 3 columns. Section 4 (bottom-left): Cross-shaped D-pad (Up, Down, Left, Right). Section 6 (bottom-right): Circular A, B, C buttons arranged in a diagonal line (bottom-left to top-right). Use CSS flex/grid and JS enforcement. Output EXCLUSIVELY valid HTML containing CSS/JS. Do NOT load external images or audio. Determine if 2D scroller (Phaser) or 3D game (ThreeJS).
